items.name: WorkOrderPricingPlugin
items.businessLogic: Calculates work-order totals from labor, parts, and agreement discounts.

items.name: AgreementRenewalPlugin
items.businessLogic: Rolls a service agreement's renewal date forward on confirmation.

items.businessLogic: Blocks duplicate serial numbers when registering a customer asset.

items.businessLogic: Stamps a sequential, prefixed invoice number on create.
